# ParagonNodeRecipeLayer.ImageHandle property

The layer's `hImageFrame` texture handle. `0` ⇒ no static art: either a runtime-bound slot (the node's own icon/symbol, the equipped-glyph image) or a pure-predicate marker widget — surfaced (not dropped) so the consumer sees the full program.

```csharp
public uint ImageHandle { get; set; }
```
